title: Cognizant Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Cognizant Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
